creator: tz@freebsd.org
text:
The "@full" did the trick, thank you very much! :)

After struggling with the setup I finally got it. Just to realize it is not usable, since there is a bug when fetching the issues. 

The developer stated, that the bug was already fixed 2 years ago. :D

But he also stated, that there will be a new release coming this month. So this should make the port usable: https://github.com/magit/forge/issues/665#issuecomment-2098331498

:)
